evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses graph.facebook.com/v19.0/{PHONE_NUMBER_ID}/messages with messaging_product:whatsapp, template type, language code — internally consistent with Cloud API conventions. HMAC sha256 with App Secret over raw body is correct. Version claimed (v19.0) and self-consistent.
evidence.executability: Code blocks parse and imports are present. However, FastAPI query alias issue: webhook GET uses hub_mode/hub_verify_token/hub_challenge without alias='hub.mode' etc., so Meta's actual query params (hub.mode, hub.verify_token, hub.challenge) will NOT bind — verification will fail. Also contains ngrok which is a sandbox-infeasibility pattern, capping at 2.
evidence.completeness: (a) credential acquisition with portal navigation ✓ (b) install bash ✓ (c) .env template ✓ (d) backend code ✓ (e) frontend code ✓ (f) test command present but split across uvicorn/ngrok/npm. Env vars listed match those referenced. Slight gap: hub.* param binding issue noted under executability not completeness.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only one link to developers.facebook.com portal homepage, not the canonical docs path (developers.facebook.com/docs/whatsapp/cloud-api). No docs URLs near code blocks.

rubric_notes: ngrok presence caps EXECUTABILITY at 2. Also hub.* query param binding bug would cause webhook verify to fail in practice. docs_unavailable=true: applied long-tail handling — internally consistent + version claimed = 4 on correctness.
